subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hearest the cries of Thy loved ones from every direction, and their lamentations from all regions and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تسمع ضجیج احبتک من کل الاشطار و صریخهم من الاقطار و من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
